hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then python3 -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 || { echo "Syntax error in $FILE" >&2; exit 2; }; fi'
bash -c 'CMD=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm\s+-rf\s+/|rm\s+-rf\s+\.\." ; then echo "Blocked dangerous rm -rf command" >&2; exit 2; fi'
